chunks.title: Benjaminites at Ziklag
chunks.reason: A catalog of names and families from Benjamin who joined David.

chunks.title: Gadites in the Wilderness
chunks.reason: A description of the Gadite warriors and a list of their leaders.

chunks.title: Defectors Join David
chunks.reason: Narrative accounts of Benjamites, Judahites, and Manassites joining David.

chunks.title: Tribal Numbers at Hebron
chunks.reason: A detailed statistical list of warriors from various tribes arriving at Hebron.

chunks.title: David Crowned King
chunks.reason: Narrative conclusion describing the unity of Israel and the celebration.
